title: Why do my edits keep appearing as Guest when made from a link in my logged-in account?
excerpt: Why do my edits keep appearing as Guest when made from a document link in my logged-in account? I have admin access as an fyi.

posts.author: rwbernknopf (Ryan Bernknopf)
posts.cookedHtml: Why do my edits keep appearing as Guest when made from a document link in my logged-in account? I have admin access as an fyi.
